mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE (user1_id = #{userId} OR user2_id = #{userId}) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE LEAST(user1_id, user2_id) = LEAST(#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}) AND GREATEST(user1_id, user2_id) = GREATEST(#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}) AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
